scripts.start: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const http = require('http'); http.createServer((req, res) => { if(req.url === '/ads.txt') { res.writeHead(200, {'Content-Type': 'text/plain'}); res.end(fs.readFileSync('ads.txt')); } else { res.writeHead(200, {'Content-Type': 'text/html; charset=utf-8'}); res.end(fs.readFileSync('studio.html')); } }).listen(process.env.PORT || 8080);"
